titleStmt.title: SII 36.151: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 151. (A.R. No. 151 of 1910.) BŌḶUMĀMPAṬṬI (Ikkarai Bōḷuvāmpaṭṭi), COIMBATORE TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Nāgēśvara temple.

summary.p: Gift of land measuring one kāṇi in extent for providing sacred food offerings (poriyaval tiruppaṇṇikāram) to the presiding deity in the Tirunāgīśvaram Uḍaiyār temple at Muṭṭam alias Amarabuyaṅgaranallūr in Pērūr-nāḍu by Viḻumipuṭṭiyāṉ Daṉapālaṉ, a maṉṟāḍi of the local village. An irrigation tank, Śrī Adisayachōḻap-pērēri, and two canals, Vīranārāyaṇavāykkāḷ and Uttamasīli-vāykkal are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī Irācarācatevaṟkku yāṇṭu mūṉṟāvatu perūr nāṭṭu
muṭṭamāṉa Amarapuyaṅkara nallūr Āḷuṭaiyār tirunāgiśvaramuṭai
yāṟku Ivvūr maṉṟāṭi kamukakkuṭaiyāril viḻumipuṭṭiyā
ṉ (tan)tanapālaneṉ tirukkāttikaikku poriyaval tiruppa
ṇṇikārattukkum Amutupaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa viñcaṉattukkum vi
ṭṭa nilamāvatu śrī Aticeyacoḻap pererik kīḻ tiruvaraṅkava
tikku kiḻakku vīranārāyaṇa vāykkālukku vaṭakku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇā
ṟṟu mūṉṟāñ caturattu vaṭameṟkaṭaiya nilam Oru māvil meṟkaṭai
ya nilaṅ kāṇi Iṉṉilaṅ kāṇiyum tulāviyāḻattu Iṭapanāyaṟ
ṟu Ivvūr viyāpāri kaṅkaṉ puḷiyaṉ Ik k[o*yal] vaṉattukku kuṭutta
Iṉ nilattukkut talaimāṟāka Ivaṉpakkal parivattaṉai paṇṇa koṇṭa
nilamāvatu śrī Aticeyacoḻap pereri kīḻ śrīkulacekara vatikku kiḻa
kku Uttamacīli vāykkālukku teṟku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ caturat
tu vaṭa meṟkaṭaiya nilam Oru māvil vaṭameṟkaṭaiya nilaṅ kāṇi In
nilaṅ kāṇiyum Ippaṭi parivattaṉai paṇṇi candrātittavaṟ celva
tāka kalveṭṭik kuṭutteṉ taṉapālaneṉ Itaṉmam paṉ
māheśvara rakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 36.151 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
